hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY: Before writing or editing ANY code in this repository, you must explicitly call the Read tool on each of these files: (1) AGENTS.md, (2) CONTRIBUTING.md, (3) README.md. For changes to specific areas, also read the relevant subdirectory AGENTS.md: ddtrace/tracer/AGENTS.md for tracer changes, contrib/AGENTS.md for contrib/integration changes, internal/AGENTS.md for internal changes, orchestrion/AGENTS.md for orchestrion changes, profiler/AGENTS.md for profiler changes. Do NOT skip this step or assume the content from your initial context is sufficient — call Read explicitly."}}'
